label: Costs of road accidents by severity

accident_costs.description: Average cost per accident (includes all casualties plus property damage, police, and insurance admin). Use these when you have accident counts rather than casualty counts.

cost_components.property_damage: Included in accident costs but not casualty costs. Covers vehicle damage, roadside infrastructure, third-party property.
cost_components.police_costs: Included in accident costs. Investigation, traffic management, reporting.
cost_components.insurance_admin: Included in accident costs. Claims processing overhead.

source.publication: TAG Data Book v2.02, Table A4.1.1 and A4.1.3

methodology: Human costs from stated preference WTP studies. Lost output from labour market earnings. Medical costs from NHS Reference Costs. Property damage and police from insurance and police data.
